ogTitle: Collaroy Plateau vs Collendina: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Collaroy Plateau and Collendina.
heading: Collaroy Plateau vs Collendina — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Collaroy Plateau, New South Wales and Collendina, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Collaroy Plateau has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Collendina (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Collaroy Plateau or Collendina safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Collaroy Plateau has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Collendina scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Collaroy Plateau scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Collendina scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Collaroy Plateau or Collendina?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Collaroy Plateau has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
